pages.raw_text:
The refuse from the overlooking
cesspools of the aristocratic resi-
dents on West Riverside avenue is
threatening the lives Of the poorer
citizens who live below in Peaceful
valley.


Those people up on the bluff where
the big sn- les stand are saving
money at l. J cost, of the health Of
the unfortunate residents below.


This is not a misstatement. 1t is
the truth.


If you don't believe it, go down
on Clark avenue in Peaceful valley
and take look at the big cesspool
on the bluff which has overlooked
and broken out. Then trail that
dirty, Shiny mass of filth as it trails
direct to the big spring, the only
source Of water supply for several
hundred people. Note the contami-
mated condition Of the waters Of the
spring


Note also the fact that for 500
feet along Clark avenue the overflow
from the cesspools of the rich has
frozen into q solid lake which makes
traffic along that street impossible.


Take notice also of the home of
G. w. Schiesser, 1904 Clark avenue,
a taxpayer. and figure out that rise
of another inch or two of that filthy
overflow from the vile cesspools of
the Riverside people will drive him
out Of his house, which will be
flooded with the deadly typhus-breed-
ing slime.


Then go kick yourself for living in
q city where


NOBODY Is TO BLAAdEI


The homes and health of % fam
lilies are threatened by the stinginess
Of the men of money living on the
blur above and


TIE CARELEssNEE OF THE
CITY oFFICIALsi


Some time ago the question OF
sewer conaections for the big houses
up on the bluff came up. 1t was not
possible at that time to get in the
sewer, so the city gave permission
for the building of big cesspool on
the bluff overlooking Peaceful valley.


Down in the valley there were hun
dreds of taxpayers and citizens who
ought to be protected against a
dozen people up on the bluff.


BUT THE PEOPLE ON THE
1r Rad THE MONEY!


Therefore the welfare of the peo-
pie in the valley was not considered
when the mammoth cesspool was
built in such manner that the seep-
age would spread disease-breeding
fifth through the valley.


The big cesspool overfiowed The
seepage cut the walls and, when the
cold weather came, the walls cracked,
into the valley. It's there now for
everyone to see.


The cesspool is said to be on the
Glidden property Each year those
connected with the cesspool are sup
posed to be assessed for cleaning and
safeguarding the spot.


If you inquire Of the people up on
the bluff they will tell you It is
NONE OF THEIR AFFAIR-BUT
Is UNDER THE CONTROL OF THE
CITY!


The people of Peaceful valley have
repeatedly petitioned the health de-
partment and the city officials for
relief.


DR.. Genoway, the health officer.
councilmen that something must be
done.
